parsed_review.summary: CP00-589 is a descriptor-only RP19 client-portal closeout pack (risk A, 10 units, RP19.P03.M05.S17-RP19.P03.M06.S06; deliverables implementation:6/contract:2/security_audit:2; micro-titles Permission And Audit Binding:4 + Synthetic Fixture Set:6). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms full internal consistency across registry.js (CP589 binding, CP588->CP589->CP590 continuity), service.js (descriptor/caseset generators with all no-write/no-leak flags), validators.js (coverage/descriptor/Hermes/Claude/handoff validators), the embedded contract descriptor (M05 tail + M06 head, including the permission_annotation/audit_annotation security_audit rows, all descriptor_only with runtime_execution:false), historical_pack_bindings (tail CP00-589), the closeout plan included_units (exact match to requirements), the test suite, and the README. command-evidence.json records every implementation/test/contract/plan/repo-wide gate at exit 0 (including npm test, npm run validate, npm run build, git diff --check) and Hermes gate H19 passed. Review hardening holds: readiness auth-preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON, validation-report shows forbidden_tools_present:false, source_inspection_mode:read_tools_used, summary_only_review_allowed:false (security/audit deliverables inspected at source), and no omitted untracked implementation files. Authority boundaries are intact: production_ready:false and runtime_ready:false (the *_verified flag is descriptor-scoped, no runtime/enterprise-trust overclaim), claude_is_final_approval:false throughout, and Hermes patterns are evidence/review-packet only (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, not embedded in product runtime). No-write/no-real-data/no-leak attestations are uniformly set, and the two modified progress-control-room files are correctly scoped out as unrelated UI-workstream dirty files. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; the pack-level descriptor production_ready claim is supported and Claude remains a read-only reviewer rather than final approver.
